I joined Brinks in 2022 as a Growth Manager.
I have overseen multiple growth projects since then.
Last quarter, we exceeded our target by twelve percent.
We have made headway on the new security platform.
Hi there! I am Sarah Mitchell, the new Regional Director from our US headquarters. I just flew in from Dallas.
Welcome to Brazil, Sarah! I am Victor Paschotto. I am the Growth Manager here.
Great to meet you! I have heard a lot about the Brazil operation. What exactly does your role involve?
I oversee growth initiatives for the LATAM region. My role involves developing strategies and working closely with stakeholders across different markets.
Impressive! Before Brinks, I spent eight years at Garda World. How long have you been with the company?
I joined in 2022. Since then, I have carried out several expansion projects, and we have made headway on new KPIs for the region.
That is exactly the kind of leadership we need across regions. I look forward to collaborating.
Likewise, Sarah! Let me know if you need anything while you are here. I will send you the key deliverables for Q3.
I am responsible for growth initiatives in the LATAM region.
My role involves developing strategies and tracking KPIs.
I work closely with stakeholders across different markets.
We have made headway on several growth projects.
It was great meeting you. I look forward to collaborating.

Hi Victor, this is Sarah Mitchell from the Americas regional office. I wanted to give you a quick heads-up about the quarterly review meeting next Thursday. We will be reviewing the growth numbers for Latin America, and I have been told that HQ wants a detailed breakdown of the new client acquisition pipeline. I have already sent you the slide template, so please fill in your section by Wednesday. One more thing: the VP from India will be joining the call, so we might need to adjust the time zone. I will confirm the final time tomorrow. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. Talk soon.

First, introduce yourself with your name and position. Second, state the purpose of the meeting. Third, present the key data points. Fourth, invite questions from the group. Fifth, summarize the next steps and deadlines.
